title: Maid Function Extension
description: Add more function call to Maid. Now your maid can do more things for you through conversations!
body:
添加了更多AI Function Call到AI模块。\
目前更新进度：\
GiveOwnerItemFunction 向主人投掷要求的物品。\
\
Added more AI Function Calls to the AI module.\
Current update progress:\
GiveOwnerItemFunction: Throw the requested item to the owner.

![Ask For](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a20a97ac5a8f6eedba2636a8b07d6963b3096e4.jpeg)
![Get Item Stack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b4c3ce1efa6cd88ce99d1dbcf35844e39f7bb2.jpeg)

![Reject](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be305592eec2a7a56412a11b845b284bdb292c89.jpeg)

在开始对话前，请将 允许FunctionCall 设置为开。\
Before starting the conversation, please set "Allow Function Call" to "On".
